registration_to_reference.reason: source units (millimeter) differ from canonical reference units (meter)

normalization.normalized_extent: largest dimension equals 1.0; aspect ratio is preserved

manifest_metadata.coordinate_notes: BodyParts3D frame: +X anatomical left, -X right, +Y posterior, -Y anterior, +Z superior; all body-part Z values are positive. This male stomach is a secondary morphology reference and must not be directly registered into the HRA female frame.
manifest_metadata.license: CC-BY-4.0 current database license; embedded OBJ contains legacy CC-BY-SA-2.1-JP notice
manifest_metadata.publisher: The Database Center for Life Science
manifest_metadata.subject_basis: BodyParts3D adult human male common-coordinate model

units.note: All physical measurements preserve source units; area and volume use squared/cubed source units.
